name: Inca Empire / 印加帝国
system: Sapa Inca + Tahuantinsuyu / 萨帕·印卡四方制

agents.name: Sapa_Inca
agents.title: Son of the Sun / 太阳之子
agents.description: Divine sovereign, sole ruler of Tahuantinsuyu

agents.name: Apu_Chinchaysuyu
agents.title: Governor of North / 北方总督
agents.description: Governor of Chinchaysuyu, the northwestern quarter

agents.name: Apu_Antisuyu
agents.title: Governor of East / 东方总督
agents.description: Governor of Antisuyu, the northeastern quarter

agents.name: Apu_Collasuyu
agents.title: Governor of South / 南方总督
agents.description: Governor of Collasuyu, the southeastern quarter

agents.name: Apu_Cuntisuyu
agents.title: Governor of West / 西方总督
agents.description: Governor of Cuntisuyu, the southwestern quarter

agents.name: Quipucamayoc
agents.title: Record Keeper / 绳结记录官
agents.description: Keeper of the quipu, master of records, census, and accounts
